note: composite_v1 K=20 EW, no regime. Regime gate broken (SPY in EXCLUDE). Fixed by computing SPY stats from daily prices.
lgbm_smooth K=20 inv_vol + regime_200ma. SPY regime now working, 30 cash months. Sharpe jump from 1.30->1.63.
lgbm K=40 inv_vol + regime_200ma. Min-var weighting didn't help. Vol-triggered regime: same result. Sharpe ceiling ~1.68.
IC analysis: LGBM pct_positive=45.8%, composite=42.5%, smooth=44.7% — all below 50%. Sharpe-target model underperforms. Performance driven by regime timing + mild survivorship bias, not alpha.
lgbm K=50 inv_vol + regime_200ma. No config passes CAGR>=50% AND Sharpe>=2.0. Sharpe wall is ~1.68. More K reduces CAGR too fast.
next_action: Try volatility targeting, cross-sectional sector rotation, or factor timing to break Sharpe ceiling
